document_info.document_type: Commercial Property policy form and endorsements

business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management – warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

coverages_discussed.current_limit: Building 146260000; Contents 42495000; Business Income 62590000; Coinsurance 80%; Deductible 75000
coverages_discussed.notes: Form CP 00 10 10 12. Policy number CP-BIP-2025-4420. Includes endorsements for Business Income and Extra Expense, Ordinance or Law, Utility Services – Direct Damage, Agreed Value, and Equipment Breakdown.
Endorsement CP 99 30 (07 88), effective 2026-03-15. Suspends coinsurance additional condition for scheduled property.

positives: Agreed Value endorsement suspends coinsurance additional condition for scheduled property.
Business Income and Extra Expense coverage is included.
Ordinance or Law, Utility Services – Direct Damage, and Equipment Breakdown endorsements broaden property protection.
concerns: High property values with Building limit of 146260000, Contents limit of 42495000, and Business Income limit of 62590000.
Industrial real estate includes warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities, which may present occupancy and tenant-related exposure.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management – warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio
